biological_replicate: primary mouse cortical neurons (E14–16) were isolated from C57BL/6 mice
technical_replicate: quantitative RT-PCR was measured in triplicate
experimental_design: We compared the survival of primary cortical neurons expressing either KIF5AWT or KIF5AΔExon27
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: The text does not specify the number of mice used, so we assume at least one mouse is used for the experiment.
number_of_samples: Since we have 1 biological replicate and no fractions, the total number of samples is 1.
